headline: Dow (DOW) Stock After Recent Slide Is There A Pricing Opportunity Now
summary: If you are wondering whether Dow is priced attractively or not, the stock's recent moves and valuation checks offer plenty to think about. Dow closed at US$27.92, with the share price up 15.0% year to date and 11.0% over the past year, even though it declined 9.3% in the last week and fell 17.3% over the past month. Those short term declines sit against a longer track record where the stock fell 38.2% over three years and declined 42.3% over five years. This mixed history can shape how...
